name: com.sharq-it.sus.router
description: Vue Router-like navigation: full guard pipeline (beforeEach/beforeResolve), query params, lazy loading, named/nested routes, redirect/alias, cursor-based history, SusRouteLink, modals, KeepAlive. Depends only on sus-core.

samples.description: Push/Replace/Back with SusTabs navigation. 4 screens: Home, About, Contact, Settings with sus-kit components.
Screen caching: counter and form keep state, Settings does not. SusTabs with a [K] indicator.
Route protection: beforeEach (auth check), CanEnter, CanLeave, BeforeResolve (redirect).
Nested and named routes: children, PushNamed, :id, ?q=, alias, redirect, lazy loading.
SusRouteLink: declarative navigation with automatic active-route highlighting.
ALL SusRouter features in one sample: sidebar, SusTabs(vertical), KeepAlive, guards, modals, transitions, named/nested, theming.
